arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney Arsenal latest with cup tie inclusion amid Celtic links
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney on Arsenal bench amid Celtic transfer links.

arts.ttl: Pundit makes clear point on strong Brendan Rodgers words after Celtic win vs St Mirren
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers made his feelings clear on Celtic fans singing Kieran Tierney’s name after the Bhoys swept aside St Mirren last weekend. On the same token, the pundit maintained that fans were purely singing out of excitement at a hero like Tierney being linked with a Celtic return .

arts.ttl: 'It's just not true'... Marvin Bartley left 'in a daze' after hearing deluded claim about Celtic and Rangers
arts.sum: Which is why when a Rangers fan made a claim about his own club being better than Celtic, it is little wonder Marvin Bartley was left stunned trying to process it. But on top of that, Celtic beat Rangers in the League Cup final this season and it caused the Bhoys to officially be crowned Scotland’s most successful club.

arts.ttl: Celtic have 'no right' to seal Kieran Tierney transfer return as pundit goes against the grain on Rodgers' Greg Taylor outburst
arts.sum: Tierney is set to leave Arsenal this month with and Stephen McGinn cannot understand the lack of stellar interest in the full back

arts.ttl: Arne Engels shares verdict on his current Celtic form and how he found spell on bench
arts.sum: On spending time on the bench now and again amid midfield competition: “I think it’s sometimes normal; I think ut’s up to me to show in training that I’m ready for the big games. Like every player, everybody wants to be in that team when the big games arrive.

arts.ttl: 'Will happen'... Kris Boyd says Celtic are set to sign 'iconic figure' in January
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers is confident Celtic will make additions over the course of the month but, so far, apart from the Kieran Tierney links to the Bhoys, the rumours have been few and far between. Boyd was speaking about the controversy over Brendan Rodgers’ criticism of Celtic fans singing Tierney’s name and the effect it would have on Greg Taylor when he claimed the big move ‘will happen’ this month.

arts.ttl: 'I don't need to bite my tongue' - Rodgers stands by Celtic post-match comments
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers declared he had the right to air his emotions as he claimed the pursuit of unity was his main motivation in calling out the reaction of some fans on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Andy Halliday reveals what Brendan Rodgers told him after Celtic hammered Motherwell
arts.sum: Halliday and Rodgers enjoyed laugh on Celtic Park pitch “He didn’t say Open Goal, he said, ‘I enjoy listening to you on the radio’.

arts.ttl: “Wonderful… so cool” – Rangers player on slaying Celtic, and family predicting it
arts.sum: Rangers defender Robin Pröpper has admitted it was “wonderful” to beat Celtic, particularly as his family had predicted they would. The 31-year-old has been speaking to Voetbal International about the recent win over Brendan Rodgers’ side at Ibrox. arts.sum: Stephen Welsh nears Celtic exit as defender 'completes medical'.
